name: Frekventni Grad
description: DJ ritam igra: tapuj beat krugove, drži combo, preživi noć u neonskom podzemnom klubu.

modules.src/main.js: Entry point: initGame, gameLoop (rAF), handleInput, startNight, endNight, transitionToNextSong — wire-uje sve module
modules.src/config.js: Sve tuning konstante: BPM po klubu, timing windows (PERFECT ±40ms / GOOD ±80ms), scoring, neon boje, energy deltasi, combo caps, prestige faktor
modules.src/state.js: Game state shape: currentClub, currentNight, currentSong, score, combo, multiplier, energy, activeBeats[], gamePhase. Save/load localStorage key 'frekventni-grad-save'
modules.src/input.js: keydown za A/S/D i Space, touch handlers za 3 horizontalne zone ekrana. Poziva scoring.processHit(lane) na svaki event
modules.src/render.js: renderFrame(state, ctx, canvas): pozadina, 3 lane-a, timing linija, beat krugovi koji putuju, hit efekti (sonar ring), neon glow
modules.src/ui.js: renderHUD(state): score, combo×multiplier badge, energy bar. renderMenu, renderNightSummary, renderGameOver, renderSetlistCards
modules.src/audio.js: Web Audio API: initAudio, playBassLoop(bpm) sa lookahead scheduler pattern, stopBassLoop, playArpeggio(bpm) arpeggio loop, stopArpeggio, playHitSound(result) PERFECT/GOOD/MISS zvukovi, playNightEnd crescendo
modules.src/systems/beatScheduler.js: Schedules beatove iz pattern-a u lookahead prozoru koristeći AudioContext.currentTime. Kreira BeatCircle objekte i dodaje ih u state.activeBeats
modules.src/systems/scoring.js: processHit(lane, hitTime): poredi sa scheduledTime najbližeg aktivnog beata u toj lani, vraća PERFECT/GOOD/MISS, ažurira score/combo/multiplier/energy
modules.src/systems/energy.js: updateEnergy(state, result): primenjuje energy deltu po rezultatu, stezanje na [0,100], vraca true ako je game over (energy <= 0)
modules.src/entities/beatCircle.js: BeatCircle entitet: {lane, scheduledTime, state, hitResult, visualProgress}. visualProgress 0→1 gde 1 = timing linija
modules.src/levels/patterns.js: Setlist: 4 kluba × 5 noći × 3 pesme. Podrum (klub 0) ima prave beat podatke (110 BPM, ~16 beatova/pesmi). Krov/Metro/Orbita su TODO stubs
